items.how_used: 论文构建了M/M/1排队系统的概率微分方程，通过状态转移概率推导系统状态概率，进而计算平均队列长度和等待时间。

variables.\\lambda: 平均到达率（每分钟到达人数）

variables.\\mu: 平均服务率（每分钟服务人数）

variables.P_0(t): t时刻系统中有0人的概率
variables.P_1(t): t时刻系统中有1人的概率

formulas.latex_code: P_n(t+\Delta t) = P_n(t)(\lambda \Delta t)(\mu \Delta t) + P_n(t)(1-\lambda \Delta t)(1-\mu \Delta t) + P_{n+1}(t)(1-\lambda \Delta t)(\mu \Delta t) + P_{n-1}(t)(\lambda \Delta t)(1-\mu \Delta t)

variables.P_n(t): t时刻系统中有n人的概率

items.source_excerpt: We then constructed a system of linear differential equations where P(S_n) is the probability that the system will be in state S_n... There are three different ways to reach S_0... There are four different ways to reach the state of having n people after Δt...

items.how_used: 论文使用蒙特卡洛模拟作为计算模型，模拟随机到达和服务过程，验证数学模型的结论并分析更复杂场景。
items.source_excerpt: We also created a computational model of the system using stochastic processes. This computational model allows for the analysis of more complex scenarios and results in more accurate numerical data than the mathematical model.

items.how_used: 论文通过改变到达率（高峰时段）进行灵敏度分析，评估不同场景下系统性能的变化。
items.source_excerpt: We also accounted for factors such as bank peak hours where we would see an increased arrival rate by adding piecewise components with respect to time to our system of differential equations.

items.how_used: 论文对多种改进方案（增加全职/兼职出纳、安装ATM）进行成本效益分析，通过比较成本与收益选择最优方案。
items.source_excerpt: Multiple improvements were modeled and tested... we performed a cost/benefit analysis to choose the optimal change. We found that... installing an ATM will be a cheaper and better solution in the long run, with a payback period of only 3 years.

items.how_used: 论文列出了8条模型假设，包括顾客行为、队列结构、银行运营时间等，每条假设都附有合理性说明。
items.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Customers entering the bank will approach an open teller immediately... Assumption 2: There is one queue... Assumption 3: Bank managers aim to minimize the cost of operation...

items.how_used: 引言部分提供了背景信息，引用研究说明等待时间与客户满意度的关系，并明确问题重述。
items.source_excerpt: Corporations devote billions of dollars each year to addressing issues like customer satisfaction and operational efficiency... research has shown a direct proportion between wait time and customer frustration (Neogi).

items.how_used: 论文通过表格或图表对比不同改进方案下的队列长度和等待时间，直观展示各方案效果。
items.source_excerpt: Multiple improvements were modeled and tested, including adding a full-time and a part-time additional teller and installing an ATM. All of these changes brought the queue length and wait time within the manager’s specifications.
